assertions.rationale: LegacySamlClaimsMapper implements ISamlClaimsMapper with the correct MapClaimsAsync method signature.

assertions.assertion: The mapper returns SamlAttribute objects with custom Name values
assertions.rationale: Returns SamlAttribute objects with names like 'urn:custom:email', 'urn:custom:name', etc.

assertions.assertion: Warns that ISamlClaimsMapper completely replaces default claim mapping — DefaultClaimMappings are not applied
assertions.rationale: Explicitly warns with bold text: 'completely replaces the default claim mapping. The default mappings configured in IdentityServerOptions.Saml.DefaultClaimMappings are not applied'.

assertions.assertion: Registers the custom mapper with dependency injection (e.g., AddTransient)
